TOOLBAR.0_REPEATING_LINEAR_GRADIENT_TO:
0
                  ? 'repeating-linear-gradient(to right, ' +
                    color +
                    ' 0, ' +
                    color +
                    ' ' +
                    preset.value[0] +
                    'px, transparent ' +
                    preset.value[0] +
                    'px, transparent ' +
                    (preset.value[0] + (preset.value[1] || 5)) +
                    'px)'
                  : ''
              "
              [style.height.px]="3"
            >
